steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage presents two contrasting facts about Brâncuşi: he heavily influenced both minimalist and abstract art, yet produced relatively few works due to his exacting standards. The correct answer captures that tension.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'themes and thematic diversity': The passage does not meaningfully discuss Brâncuşi's themes or range of subjects. ✗
  • Choice B — 'substantial historical importance despite limited output': Directly captures the disparity between his outsized influence and small body of work. ✓
  • Choice C — 'his general work versus Bird in Space': Both are described similarly in the passage; there is no real contrast between them. ✗
  • Choice D — 'artist themes not discussed in the passage': Introduces ideas the passage never raises. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
